# GitHub Copilot Instructions for Two-Eyed Seeing Thinking MCP

## 🛑 Project Status: Ceremonial Pause - Phase 0

**This project is in Phase 0: Community Relationship Establishment (Nov 1 - Dec 21, 2025)**

Before making any contributions, understand:
- We are NOT in active implementation
- We are in ceremonial pause awaiting Indigenous community partnership
- No holistic thinking code should be written during Phase 0
- Sequential thinking tool (v1.0.1) is operational and can be maintained
- All significant decisions require community co-creation
